items.text_preview: Use Cases A downloadable MCP server that runs locally, using native tools and system-level permissions to perform tasks independently of external infrastructure. items.source_title: Memory poisoning in third-party MCP usage
items.text_preview: Current Vulnerability Landscape Common attack patterns have begun to emerge around MCP, many focused on malicious inputs designed to influence an LLM, or attacks that impact the tools an LLM calls. items.source_title: Client security, server discovery and verification
items.text_preview: • Validate Untrusted Data: Sanitize and validate all external data, such as tool descriptions and server responses, and user inputs before passing it to the model.
